title: HEXA-WEAVE MVP W5 — alt-paths executed (Alt-2 RCSB + Alt-3 mock-up + Alt-4 lean4 docstring)
task_label: cycle 9 / fan-out 3/5 W5 alt-path execution (no GPU, no torch, no weights)
scope: Cycle 8 fan-out 4/5 identified 4 GPU-free alternative paths to advance F-TP5-b without burning GPU. Cycle 9 fan-out 3/5 actually executes 3 of 4: Alt-2 (RCSB JSON-API HTTP POST → real entry-ID list), Alt-3 (stdlib-only mock-up python wrapper body-embedded with selftest), Alt-4 (AX2.lean §8 docstring strengthening — comment-only edit, no theorem/axiom change). Alt-1 (external review) skipped — no reviewer pool yet.
